hero.headline: Redefining modern dental care.
hero.subheadline: Healthcare, technology, hospitality, and design come together to create a better experience from the moment you walk through the door.

about.title: The Story Behind Luxe Dental
about.text1: Many patients delay dental treatment for years. Not because they don't understand its importance, but because they associate dental visits with discomfort, anxiety, confusion, and uncertainty.
about.text2: Luxe Dental was founded with the belief that great dentistry begins long before treatment starts. It begins with trust, communication, and creating an environment where patients feel understood.

services.title: Our Philosophy
services.subtitle: Proactive, not reactive. Explore our treatments.

cta.title: Ready for a brighter smile?
cta.subtitle: Book your appointment today and experience the difference.

experience.title: The Lumina Experience
experience.subtitle: Redefining dental visits through a focus on sensory comfort, expert care, and an environment designed to put you completely at ease.

acoustic.title: Acoustic Serenity
acoustic.desc: Immerse yourself in calm with our curated noise-canceling audio options, ensuring a peaceful environment from the moment you sit down.

amenities.title: Luxury Amenities
amenities.desc: Enjoy weighted blankets, ergonomic memory foam seating, and warm aromatherapy towels designed to relieve tension.

t1.text: "The most relaxing dental experience I've ever had. The attention to detail and the sheer comfort of the clinic made all my anxiety disappear."
t1.author: Sarah J.

t2.text: "Impeccable service from start to finish. The technology they use is incredible, and the staff is genuinely caring and professional."
t2.author: Michael T.

t3.text: "Aesthetically stunning clinic, but more importantly, the results of my cosmetic treatment exceeded all expectations. Highly recommended."
t3.author: Elena R.

comprehensive.title: Comprehensive Care
comprehensive.subtitle: Expertise spanning across all facets of modern dentistry, utilizing advanced techniques for optimal, lasting results.

cosmetic.title: Cosmetic Dentistry
cosmetic.desc: Veneers, professional whitening, and comprehensive smile design.

restorative.title: Restorative Care
restorative.desc: Precision crowns, bridges, and tooth-colored composite fillings.

surgical.title: Surgical Procedures
surgical.desc: Expert implant placement, extractions, and bone grafting.

general.title: General Dentistry
general.desc: Preventative care, thorough examinations, and professional hygiene.

feature.title: Implantology Excellence
feature.desc: Our surgical suites are equipped with state-of-the-art 3D imaging and guided surgery technology, ensuring precise placement and optimal recovery for restorative procedures.

team.title: The Hands Behind the Smile
team.subtitle: Our carefully selected team of specialists brings together decades of experience, continuous education, and a shared passion for patient-centric care.

ivy.title: Ivy League Educated
ivy.desc: Our specialists hold degrees from top-tier institutions.

collab.title: Collaborative Approach
collab.desc: Complex cases are reviewed by our entire panel of experts.

pricing.title: Investment in Your Smile
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing for premium care. We believe in providing clear expectations without hidden costs.

items.name: Comprehensive Consultation
items.desc: Includes 3D scan, thorough exam, and personalized treatment plan.

items.name: Professional Whitening
items.desc: In-clinic laser whitening session for immediate results.

pricing.footer: Flexible financing options available. Contact us for detailed estimates.
